privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Blender 4.2.4 (LTS) scene with exactly 14 synthetic objects: 7 meshes (BaseCube, Sphere, Cylinder, Cone, Torus, Suzanne, GroundPlane), 3 lights (SunLight, PointLight, SpotLight), 2 cameras (MainCamera, OverheadCamera), and 2 empties (PivotEmpty, TargetEmpty). The task requires organizing these into four named collections (Geometry, Lighting, Cameras, Helpers) and hiding the Helpers collection from viewport. The verifier checks all object counts per collection, viewport visibility of Helpers, whether the default collection is empty, and penalizes object deletion. The output file path is /home/ga/BlenderProjects/organized_scene.blend.
